articles.title: AT&T Inc. $T Shares Acquired by Avanza Fonder AB
articles.summary: Avanza Fonder AB increased its stake in AT&T Inc. by 10.6% in the fourth quarter, acquiring 56,009 additional shares, bringing their total holdings to 584,097 shares valued at $14.51 million. AT&T reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing expectations with $0.52 EPS and $33.47 billion in revenue, and set an optimistic FY2026 EPS guidance. Wall Street analysts maintain a bullish outlook, with several firms raising price targets, further supported by AT&T's plans to increase prices for legacy unlimited plans, which could enhance revenue and margins.

articles.title: Target Corp. stock underperforms Monday when compared to competitors despite daily gains
articles.summary: Target Corp. (TGT) shares rose 1.47% on Monday to $114.93, breaking a five-day losing streak, despite the company's stock underperforming compared to its competitors. This occurred during a favorable trading session for the broader market, with the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average both seeing gains.
